UserName.description: The user name of the current Airalogy user

CurrentTime.description: The current time. The timezone is based on the user's browser.

CurrentProtocolId.description: The ID of the current Airalogy Protocol.

CurrentRecordId.description: The ID of the current Airalogy Record.

EntityRef.title: EntityRef
EntityRef.description:
Reference to a named entity in a connector-backed source.

`entity` is the entity namespace, such as plasmid or strain. `id` is the
stable identifier inside that namespace/source. Extra fields are allowed so
hosts can retain display snapshots or source-specific reference metadata.

ResourceRef.title: ResourceRef
ResourceRef.description:
Stable reference to a Platform-managed resource.

Quantities are represented by :class:`~decimal.Decimal` in Python and are
serialized as strings so a Record never loses precision while crossing a
JSON or JavaScript boundary.

Observation.title: Observation
Observation.description: A typed value with observation time, receipt time, and provenance.

ObservationSeriesRef.title: ObservationSeriesRef
ObservationSeriesRef.description: Reference to a file-backed high-volume observation series.

BloodType.title: Blood type
BloodType.description: Common ABO blood group values. Values such as A+ or A- combine an ABO group with Rh positive or Rh negative status. Rh+ and Rh- are allowed when only Rh factor is recorded.

ChineseEducationLevel.title: 文化程度
ChineseEducationLevel.description: 中国居民信息登记中常用的文化程度分类。

ChineseEthnicGroup.title: 民族
ChineseEthnicGroup.description: 中国国务院公布的 56 个法定民族之一。

ChineseGender.title: 性别
ChineseGender.description: 中国居民信息登记中常用的性别分类。

ChineseMaritalStatus.title: 婚姻状况
ChineseMaritalStatus.description: 中国居民信息登记中常用的婚姻状况分类。

ChineseProvinceLevelRegion.title: 省级行政区
ChineseProvinceLevelRegion.description: 中国现行省级行政区（省、自治区、直辖市、特别行政区）。

FileIdPNG.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdPNG. This type allows users to upload a .png file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdJPG.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdJPG. This type allows users to upload a .jpg file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdSVG.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdSVG. This type allows users to upload a .svg file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdWEBP.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdWEBP. This type allows users to upload a .webp file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdTIFF.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdTIFF. This type allows users to upload a .tiff file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdMP4.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdMP4. This type allows users to upload a .mp4 file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdMP3.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdMP3. This type allows users to upload a .mp3 file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdAIMD.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdAIMD. This type allows users to upload a .aimd file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdMD.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdMD. This type allows users to upload a .md file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdTXT.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdTXT. This type allows users to upload a .txt file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdCSV.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdCSV. This type allows users to upload a .csv file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdJSON.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdJSON. This type allows users to upload a .json file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdDOCX.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdDOCX. This type allows users to upload a .docx file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdXLSX.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdXLSX. This type allows users to upload a .xlsx file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdPPTX.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdPPTX. This type allows users to upload a .pptx file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdPDF.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdPDF. This type allows users to upload a .pdf file and inject it into the related data field.

FileIdDNA.description: Airalogy built-in type: FileIdDNA. This type allows users to upload a .dna file and inject it into the related data field.

IgnoreStr.description: In an Airalogy Field of this type, a user may provide a string; however, when the Airalogy Record is submitted, the string is not persisted. This is intended for sensitive input (such as an API key) that the Airalogy Protocol Assigner can consume during processing but that should never be stored in the final Record.

CodeStr.description: Airalogy built-in type: CodeStr (plaintext). Strings of this type contain language-agnostic code or structured text and are rendered in a plain code editor.

PyStr.description: Airalogy built-in type: CodeStr (python). Strings of this type contain python source code and are rendered in an editor with python syntax highlighting.

JsStr.description: Airalogy built-in type: CodeStr (javascript). Strings of this type contain javascript source code and are rendered in an editor with javascript syntax highlighting.

TsStr.description: Airalogy built-in type: CodeStr (typescript). Strings of this type contain typescript source code and are rendered in an editor with typescript syntax highlighting.

JsonStr.description: Airalogy built-in type: CodeStr (json). Strings of this type contain json source code and are rendered in an editor with json syntax highlighting.

TomlStr.description: Airalogy built-in type: CodeStr (toml). Strings of this type contain toml source code and are rendered in an editor with toml syntax highlighting.

YamlStr.description: Airalogy built-in type: CodeStr (yaml). Strings of this type contain yaml source code and are rendered in an editor with yaml syntax highlighting.

DNASequence.title: DNASequence
DNASequence.description:
Structured DNA sequence value used by Airalogy's dedicated sequence editor.

This model intentionally stays simpler than full GenBank flatfiles while
preserving the core pieces needed for practical import/export alignment:
multi-segment feature locations, partial flags, and qualifier rows.
